homepage.heroSubline: Built tough. Built to last. Oil Capital Deck Solutions delivers superior craftsmanship and enduring value across Tulsa.
aboutText: Oil Capital Deck Solutions isn't just building decks; we're building relationships across Tulsa. Founded over a decade ago by a team of experienced carpenters, we saw a need for reliable, high-quality deck construction that could withstand Oklahoma's demanding climate.

Our approach is simple: honest communication, meticulous attention to detail, and a commitment to using only the best materials. We treat every project, from small repairs to expansive custom decks, with the same level of dedication.
We're proud to be a part of the Tulsa community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local charities, and strive to create outdoor spaces that enhance the lives of our neighbors.

services.name: Deck Construction
services.shortDescription: Custom deck design and construction to enhance your Tulsa home.
services.description:
Whether you envision a sprawling multi-level deck for entertaining or a cozy platform for quiet relaxation, Oil Capital Deck Solutions delivers exceptional deck construction services. We begin with a thorough consultation to understand your needs, preferences, and budget. Our experienced designers will then create a custom deck plan that complements your home's architecture and maximizes your outdoor living space. 

We handle every aspect of the construction process, from permitting and site preparation to framing, decking, railing installation, and finishing touches. We use only premium-grade lumber, composite decking, and fasteners to ensure lasting durability and beauty. Our team is skilled in working with a variety of materials, including pressure-treated wood, cedar, redwood, and composite decking from leading manufacturers. 

We understand the importance of building a deck that can withstand Tulsa's challenging climate. That's why we pay close attention to proper drainage, ventilation, and structural integrity. We also offer a range of optional features, such as built-in seating, pergolas, lighting, and outdoor kitchens, to further enhance your deck experience.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design – Discuss your vision and create a custom deck plan.
Step 2: Permitting and Preparation – Obtain necessary permits and prepare the construction site.
Step 3: Framing and Decking – Build the deck's foundation and install the decking surface.
Step 4: Railing and Finishing – Install railings, stairs, and other finishing touches.

faq.question: How long does deck construction typically take?
faq.answer: The timeframe depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most decks can be completed within 2-4 weeks.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a deck in Tulsa?
faq.answer: Yes, a building permit is required for most deck construction projects in Tulsa. We handle the permitting process for our clients.

faq.question: What type of decking material is best for Tulsa's climate?
faq.answer: Composite decking is a popular choice for Tulsa due to its resistance to moisture, fading, and insect damage. Pressure-treated wood is also a durable and cost-effective option.

services.name: Deck Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert deck repair services to restore the safety and beauty of your Tulsa deck.
services.description:
Is your deck showing signs of wear and tear? Don't let minor damage turn into a major problem. Oil Capital Deck Solutions offers comprehensive deck repair services to address a wide range of issues, from loose railings and wobbly steps to rotted boards and structural damage. We understand the importance of maintaining a safe and sound deck, especially in Tulsa's climate, where extreme temperatures and moisture can take a toll on wood structures.

Our experienced carpenters will thoroughly inspect your deck to identify the source of the problem and recommend the most effective repair solutions. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs that blend seamlessly with your existing deck. Whether you need a few boards replaced, a railing repaired, or a complete deck overhaul, we have the skills and expertise to get the job done right.

We also offer preventative maintenance services to help extend the life of your deck and prevent future problems. This includes cleaning, sealing, and staining to protect your deck from the elements. Regular maintenance can save you money in the long run by preventing costly repairs.
process: Step 1: Inspection – Thoroughly assess the deck's condition and identify areas needing repair.
Step 2: Repair Plan – Develop a detailed repair plan and provide a transparent estimate.
Step 3: Repair Execution – Perform the necessary repairs using quality materials and techniques.
Step 4: Finishing – Ensure the repairs blend seamlessly with the existing deck and apply protective coatings.

faq.question: How do I know if my deck needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs of deck damage include loose railings, wobbly steps, cracked or rotted boards, and visible signs of insect damage.

faq.question: How much does deck repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of deck repair varies depending on the extent of the damage and the materials needed. We provide free estimates for all deck repair projects.

faq.question: Can you match the existing stain on my deck?
faq.answer: Yes, we can match most deck stains to ensure a uniform appearance after repairs.

services.name: Deck Staining & Sealing
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your deck with professional staining and sealing services in Tulsa.
services.description:
Tulsa's weather can be brutal on decks. The intense summer sun, freezing winters, and frequent rain can cause wood to fade, crack, and rot. Oil Capital Deck Solutions offers professional deck staining and sealing services to protect your investment and keep your deck looking its best for years to come. We use only premium-quality stains and sealants that are specifically formulated to withstand Oklahoma's harsh climate.

Our staining and sealing process begins with a thorough cleaning to remove dirt, mildew, and old coatings. We then apply a high-quality stain in your choice of color to enhance the natural beauty of the wood and provide UV protection. Finally, we apply a sealant to create a waterproof barrier that prevents moisture from penetrating the wood and causing rot. 

We offer a variety of staining and sealing options to suit your needs and preferences, including transparent, semi-transparent, and solid stains. We can also help you choose the right stain color to complement your home's exterior and landscape. Regular staining and sealing is essential for maintaining the beauty and longevity of your deck.
process: Step 1: Cleaning – Thoroughly clean the deck surface to remove dirt, mildew, and old coatings.
Step 2: Staining – Apply a high-quality stain in your choice of color to enhance the wood's natural beauty.
Step 3: Sealing – Apply a sealant to create a waterproof barrier and protect the wood from the elements.
Step 4: Inspection – Inspect the finished deck to ensure a uniform and protective coating.

faq.question: How often should I stain and seal my deck?
faq.answer: We recommend staining and sealing your deck every 2-3 years, depending on the amount of exposure to the elements.

faq.question: What is the difference between stain and sealant?
faq.answer: Stain adds color and UV protection, while sealant creates a waterproof barrier that prevents moisture from penetrating the wood.

faq.question: Can I stain and seal my deck myself?
faq.answer: While DIY staining and sealing is possible, professional application ensures a more uniform and durable finish.

services.name: Pergola Construction
services.shortDescription: Add shade and style to your Tulsa outdoor space with a custom-built pergola.
services.description:
Enhance your Tulsa backyard with a custom-designed and expertly constructed pergola from Oil Capital Deck Solutions. A pergola provides shade, defines your outdoor space, and adds architectural interest to your property. We work closely with you to create a pergola that complements your home's style and meets your specific needs.

We offer a wide range of pergola designs, from simple and elegant to elaborate and ornate. Choose from a variety of materials, including wood, vinyl, and metal, to create the perfect look for your outdoor space. We handle every aspect of the construction process, from permitting and site preparation to framing, roofing, and finishing touches.

A pergola can transform your deck or patio into a comfortable and inviting outdoor living area. Add climbing plants for a touch of natural beauty, or install lighting for nighttime enjoyment. With a custom-built pergola from Oil Capital Deck Solutions, you can create the outdoor oasis of your dreams.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – Discuss your vision and create a custom pergola design.
Step 2: Material Selection – Choose the materials that best suit your style and budget.
Step 3: Construction – Build the pergola according to the approved design and specifications.
Step 4: Finishing Touches – Add any desired features, such as lighting or climbing plants.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a pergola in Tulsa?
faq.answer: A building permit may be required for pergola construction, depending on the size and location. We handle the permitting process for our clients.

faq.question: What is the best material for a pergola?
faq.answer: Wood is a popular choice for pergolas due to its natural beauty and durability. Vinyl and metal are also good options for low-maintenance pergolas.

faq.question: Can I attach a pergola to my house?
faq.answer: Yes, a pergola can be attached to your house or built as a freestanding structure.

services.name: Deck Lighting
services.shortDescription: Illuminate your Tulsa deck with stylish and energy-efficient deck lighting solutions.
services.description:
Extend the usability of your Tulsa deck into the evening hours with professionally installed deck lighting from Oil Capital Deck Solutions. Our deck lighting solutions not only enhance the ambiance of your outdoor space but also improve safety and security. We offer a wide range of lighting options, including LED lights, string lights, and post cap lights, to create the perfect atmosphere for your deck.

Our experienced electricians will carefully install your deck lighting to ensure proper wiring and safety. We use only high-quality, weather-resistant fixtures that are designed to withstand Oklahoma's harsh climate. Choose from a variety of lighting styles and colors to create the perfect look for your deck. 

Deck lighting can transform your deck into a magical outdoor oasis. Whether you're hosting a party or simply relaxing with family, deck lighting creates a warm and inviting atmosphere. With deck lighting from Oil Capital Deck Solutions, you can enjoy your deck year-round.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – Discuss your lighting needs and create a custom lighting plan.
Step 2: Fixture Selection – Choose the lighting fixtures that best suit your style and budget.
Step 3: Installation – Carefully install the lighting fixtures according to the approved plan.
Step 4: Testing – Test the lighting system to ensure proper functionality and safety.

faq.question: What type of lighting is best for decks?
faq.answer: LED lighting is a popular choice for decks due to its energy efficiency, long lifespan, and variety of styles.

faq.question: Can you install lighting on an existing deck?
faq.answer: Yes, we can install lighting on both new and existing decks.

faq.question: Is deck lighting safe?
faq.answer: Yes, when installed properly by a qualified electrician, deck lighting is safe and reliable.

services.name: Railing Installation
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your Tulsa deck with safe and stylish railing installation services.
services.description:
Ensure the safety and enhance the aesthetics of your Tulsa deck with professional railing installation from Oil Capital Deck Solutions. We offer a wide variety of railing options to suit your style and budget, including wood, vinyl, metal, and composite railings. Our experienced installers will carefully install your new railings to ensure they meet all safety codes and regulations.

Railing is an essential safety feature for any deck, especially those that are elevated. We use only high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure your railings are strong, durable, and long-lasting. Choose from a variety of railing styles and colors to complement your deck and home's exterior.

Whether you're building a new deck or replacing old railings, Oil Capital Deck Solutions has the expertise to get the job done right. We are committed to providing our clients with safe, stylish, and affordable railing solutions.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design – Discuss your railing needs and create a custom railing plan.
Step 2: Material Selection – Choose the railing materials that best suit your style and budget.
Step 3: Installation – Carefully install the railings according to the approved plan and specifications.
Step 4: Inspection – Inspect the finished railing to ensure safety and compliance with building codes.

faq.question: What type of railing is best for decks?
faq.answer: The best type of railing for your deck depends on your personal preferences, budget, and the style of your home. Wood, vinyl, metal, and composite railings are all popular options.

faq.question: Are there building codes for deck railings in Tulsa?
faq.answer: Yes, there are specific building codes for deck railings in Tulsa. We ensure that all of our railing installations meet or exceed these codes.

faq.question: Can you replace my existing deck railings?
faq.answer: Yes, we can replace your existing deck railings with new, safer, and more stylish railings.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Oil Capital Deck Solutions built us a beautiful new deck off our kitchen. The design process was collaborative, and the crew was professional and efficient. The finished product is exactly what we wanted, and we've already enjoyed many evenings out there. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Our deck had some serious rot after the winter, especially around the support posts. Oil Capital Deck Solutions came out and replaced the damaged sections quickly and at a fair price. They also gave us some great tips on how to maintain the deck and prevent future problems.

reviews.name: Emily L.
reviews.text: We hired Oil Capital Deck Solutions to stain and seal our deck, and we couldn't be happier with the results. The deck looks brand new, and the stain color is perfect. The crew was meticulous and paid attention to every detail. They even cleaned up thoroughly afterward. A+ service!

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: The pergola they built over our patio is stunning! It provides the perfect amount of shade and has completely transformed our backyard. The craftsmanship is excellent, and the team was a pleasure to work with from start to finish.

reviews.name: Jessica S.
reviews.text: Oil Capital Deck Solutions installed deck lighting for us and it looks great. It really sets the mood for evening gatherings. I appreciated their professionalism and attention to detail during the installation. Would hire again.

reviews.name: Brian T.
reviews.text: From the initial consultation to the final inspection, Oil Capital Deck Solutions was fantastic. They listened to our ideas, offered helpful suggestions, and built us a deck that exceeded our expectations. The quality of their work is top-notch.
